title: Bread Steak Burger
description: this project adds a delicious hamburger that restores 12 hunger
body: The Bread Steak Burger is a nutritious food item that restores 12 hunger points when consumed, making it one of the more filling meals available in the game. Simply right-click while holding the burger to eat it, and you'll hear a satisfying burp sound upon consumption. This hearty meal can only be eaten when you're not at full hunger, following standard food mechanics.
